title: campylospermum densiflorum
intro: Campylospermum densiflorum, also known as the "African Pear", is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae. It has been traditionally used in African medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been reported to have various health benefits, including the ability to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its use as a treatment for malaria. In herbal preparations, the leaves and bark of Campylospermum densiflorum can be used to make decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to have a range of health benefits.
